hero.tagline: Creating a better world for workers in Africa and beyond
hero.title:
TOGETHER, LET'S DEFEND
THE RIGHTS OF
AFRICAN WORKERS
hero.subtitle: 18 million members in 52 African countries fighting every day for social justice and decent work.

footer.description: African Regional Organisation of the International Trade Union Confederation. Representing 18 million members in 52 countries.

mission.title: THE ITUC-AFRICA REGIONAL ORGANISATION
mission.text1: ITUC-Africa is a pan-African trade union organisation created in November 2007, from the merger of ICFTU-Afro and OATUU. It represents 107 affiliated trade union centres in 52 African countries, with 18 million declared members.
mission.text2: Our mission is to represent workers in Africa through unity, advocacy and capacity building, to achieve decent work and equality for social justice.

impact.stats_subtitle: A continental network serving African workers.
impact.map_subtitle: Active in 52 countries, from Dakar to Nairobi, Cairo to Johannesburg.
